title: The Download: a useful quantum machine and a record-breaking subsea tunnel
summary: PsiQuantum is developing a massive quantum computer using light-based technology. The article highlights both this quantum advancement and a record-breaking subsea tunnel project. These breakthroughs demonstrate significant progress in two distinct areas of infrastructure and computing technology.
content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. PsiQuantum has a plan to make a massive quantum computer out of light The machine that could change the world will be housed in a room that looks like a data…

zh.title: 下载：有用的量子机器和创纪录的海底隧道
zh.summary: PsiQuantum正在开发一台使用光学技术的大规模量子计算机。该文章强调了这一量子进步和创纪录的海底隧道项目。这些突破表明在基础设施和计算技术两个不同领域都取得了重大进展。
